description_long: This is a modern, rectangular toaster with a sleek, metallic front panel and matte black sides. The front features a prominent lever, a round control knob, and several small buttons, all arranged for easy access. The top of the toaster has two wide, parallel slots for toasting bread, with metallic trim around the openings. The sides are smooth and unadorned, finished in a deep black color, while the back is a plain metallic surface. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or break rooms. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A compact, modern toaster with a metallic front, black sides, and two top slots for bread. Features a lever, control knob, and buttons on the front panel.
description_view_0: The left side of the toaster, showing a smooth, matte black surface with no visible controls or features.
description_view_1: The front view displays the metallic panel with a lever, round control knob, and several buttons, as well as the two top slots for bread.
description_view_2: The right side of the toaster, similar to the left, with a smooth, matte black finish and no visible controls.
description_view_3: The back of the toaster, featuring a plain metallic surface with no visible controls or openings.
attribute_control_knobs: One round control knob on the lower right of the front panel, metallic in appearance, with no visible labeling or markings.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots on the top, evenly spaced and trimmed with metallic edges.
